memberdef.argsstring: (num_layers, num_species, params, airden_dry, mairden, pedge, pfilsan, pfllsan, reevapls, t, tstep, species_is_aerosol, species_short_name, species_henry_cr, species_henry_k0, species_henry_pka, species_wd_retfactor, species_wd_liqandgas, species_wd_convfaci2g, species_wd_rainouteff, species_radius, species_mw_g, species_conc, species_tendencies, wetdep_mass_per_species_per_level, wetdep_flux_per_species_per_level, diagnostic_species_id)
memberdef.name: compute_jacob

briefdescription.para: Pure science computation for jacob scheme.

detaileddescription.para: This is a pure computational kernel implementing Jacob et al. [2000] wet deposition scheme. NO error checking, validation, or infrastructure concerns. Host model must ensure all inputs are valid before calling.

parameterdescription.para: Time step [s] - retrieved from process interface
Wet deposition mass loss per species per level [kg/m2] (num_species)
Wet deposition flux per species per level [kg/m2/s] (num_species)
Wet deposition mass loss per species per level [kg/m2] (num_species)
Wet deposition flux per species per level [kg/m2/s] (num_species)
Indices mapping diagnostic species to species array (optional, for per-species diagnostics)

memberdef.argsstring: (is_aero, efficiency, wd_lidandgas, k0, cr, pka, cnvi2g, retfac, f, k, dt, tk, c_h2o, cldice, cldliq, spc, lossfrac, so2, h2o2)
memberdef.name: rainout

briefdescription.para: Computes RAINFRAC, the fraction of soluble species lost to rainout events in precipitation.

parameterdescription.para: temperature-dependent scale factor for rainout fraction
ice-to-gas ratio is computed by co-condensation?
Conversion factor from ice to gas ratio if wd_LidAndGas is true
Fraction of grid box that is precipiting [unitless]
Mix ratio of H2O [cm3 H2O/cm3 air]
Precipitable cloud ice mixing ratio [cm3 ice/cm3 air]
Precipitable cloud liquid mixing ratio [cm3 H2O/cm3 air]
Fraction of species lost to rainout [unitless]
temperature-dependent scale factor for rainout fraction
ice-to-gas ratio is computed by co-condensation?
Conversion factor from ice to gas ratio if wd_LidAndGas is true
Fraction of grid box that is precipiting [unitless]
Mix ratio of H2O [cm3 H2O/cm3 air]
Precipitable cloud ice mixing ratio [cm3 ice/cm3 air]
Precipitable cloud liquid mixing ratio [cm3 H2O/cm3 air]
Fraction of species lost to rainout [unitless]

memberdef.argsstring: (radius, f, tk, qdwn, dz, dt, spc, is_aero, k0, cr, pka, wtune, radius_thr, washfrac, kin, so2, h2o2)
memberdef.name: washout

briefdescription.para: Computes WASHFRAC, the fraction of soluble species lost to washout events in precipitation.

parameterdescription.para: Fraction of grid box that is precipitating [unitless]
Instant precip rate in grid box (cm3 (H2O) / cm2 (air) / s)
Washout tuning factor; newly added in GOCART version
Fine/coarse particle radius threshold (um); using 1.0 um for now
Fraction of species lost to washout [unitless]
Fraction of grid box that is precipitating [unitless]
Instant precip rate in grid box (cm3 (H2O) / cm2 (air) / s)
Washout tuning factor; newly added in GOCART version
Fine/coarse particle radius threshold (um); using 1.0 um for now
Fraction of species lost to washout [unitless]
H2O2 conc [kg/kg] TODO: conc's after aqueous rxns are applied. These are computed
SO2 conc [kg/kg] in the sulfate chemistry module and passed here (not considered by now)

briefdescription.para: Computes the fraction of species lost to rainout.

parameterdescription.para: Fraction of grid box that is precipiting [unitless]
Fraction of grid box that is precipiting [unitless]

briefdescription.para: Computes the ratio L2G = Cliq / Cgas, which is the mixing ratio of species in the liquid phase, divided by the mixing ratio of species in the gas phase.

memberdef.argsstring: (radius, f, tk, pdwn, dt, tuning, radius_fine)
memberdef.name: washfrac_aerosol

briefdescription.para: Computes the fraction of soluble aerosol species lost to washout.

parameterdescription.para: Instant precip rate in grid box (cm3 (H2O) / cm2 (air) / s)
Washout tuning factor; newly added in GOCART version
Fine particle radius threshold (um); using 1.0 um for now
Instant precip rate in grid box (cm3 (H2O) / cm2 (air) / s)
Washout tuning factor; newly added in GOCART version
fine particle radius threshold (um); using 1.0 um for now

briefdescription.para: Computes the fraction of HNO3 species lost to washout.

parameterdescription.para: Fraction of grid box that is precipitating [unitless]
Instant precip rate in grid box (cm3 (H2O) / cm2 (air) / s)
Fraction of grid box that is precipitating [unitless]
Precip rate thru bottom of grid box (cm3 (H2O) / cm2 (air) / s)

memberdef.argsstring: (f, tk, pdwn, dz, dt, k0, cr, pka, washfrac, kin)
memberdef.name: washfrac_liq_gas

briefdescription.para: Computes the fraction of soluble liquid/gas phase species lost to washout.

parameterdescription.para: Fraction of grid box that is precipitating [unitless]
Instant precip rate in grid box (cm3 (H2O) / cm2 (air) / s)
Fraction of species lost to washout [unitless]
Fraction of grid box that is precipitating [unitless]
Precip rate thru bottom of grid box (cm3 (H2O) / cm2 (air) / s)
Fraction of species lost to washout [unitless]

briefdescription.para: Computes the concentrations of species lost to rainout.

parameterdescription.para: Fraction of species lost to washout [unitless]
fraction of species lost to rainout [unitless]

memberdef.argsstring: (k, lossfrac, kin, f_washout, f_rainout, pdwn, reevap, delz_cm, conc, dconc, spc, so4)
memberdef.name: washout_loss

briefdescription.para: Computes the concentrations of species lost to washout.

parameterdescription.para: fraction of species lost to washout [unitless]
fraction of species lost to rainout [unitless]

briefdescription.para: Computes the re-evaporation all of the soluble species back into the atmosphere.
